title: Disappearance Cases That Frustrate Investigators

segments.text: Three arrests made, yet Sara Graham's case stays unsolved.
And the details are more puzzling than we think.
Sara vanished in 2015, and the truth eludes everyone.
Even after arrests, key pieces are still missing.
What could these suspects reveal about her fate?
Investigators are left with more questions than answers.
Her family's search continues with no end in sight.
How long can a mystery like this last?
Follow for mysteries we still can't explain.

description: An unsolved case with more questions than answers. Follow for daily mysteries! 🌑
